title: DIAMANTE Water Glasses or Whisky Tumblers - ‘Moda’ Collection Undecorated Crystal - Set of 6 Short Drinks Crystal Glasses
features: Set of 6 crystal water glasses or whisky tumblers, part of our ‘Moda’ collection. A classic curved glass with a freshened up, modern take
Made from premium ultra clear blown lead free crystal
Packaged in a DIAMANTE branded box
description: Product Description DIAMANTE Here at DIAMANTE we have over 30 years worth of experience working with centuries old British and international crystal and homeware brands. As a family based, artisanal crystal engraver and producer, we are delighted to be bringing our products straight to the market for the first time. We specialise in ultra clear premium crystal and offer a very broad choice, ranging from hand cut and polished, Swarovski embellished single gift pieces, to a whole set of smooth undecorated premium glasses for each and every drinking requirement. Whether you choose our 24% lead crystal or our lead free crystal, we can assure that by upholding the ancient principles of glass making each piece will brighten up your home with dazzling clarity, whether it's a gift or used daily. Visit our DIAMANTE Store to shop our whole range Wine and Champagne Glasses With a range of shapes and sizes, our glasses are blown to bring out the natural aromas of wine. Typically, red wine glasses are a little larger than white and rose glasses. This allows more oxygen to get to the red wine. On the other hand our champagne and prosecco flutes are narrow and tall to retain the fizz and sparkle, although we do also offer saucers and coupes for a more art deco style. Whisky Glasses & Sets Pressed or blown, 24% lead or lead free, classic or contemporary designs, we offer a choice for everyone. Dorchester, Buckingham or Chatsworth collections are our timeless classics, but we also offer more simplistic options such as the plain Auris collection or the Thames or Severn decanters. Gin Copas Gin, typically enjoyed from hi ball glasses has recently seen a resurgence thanks to the introduction of large, balloon type gin copas. Not only do these copas fit more in, but they allow more experimenting with various flavours and garnishes. Perfect for gifting, with many designs to choose from, we offer these in singles, pairs and some even in a box of 6. Tumblers and Hi Balls Perfect all rounders, just as happy serving juice in the morning, water at lunch and a cocktail when you put your feet up in the evening. Vases Liven up your home or office with our selection of crystal vases and bowls. Featuring a choice of simple or Swarovski embellished designs, these lovely pieces also make perfect gifts. Decanters & Carafes As well as sets, we offer standalone decanters and carafes, letting you do the mixing and matching to find that perfect combination. Ornaments and Cocktail Glasses Bits and bobs such as candleholders, Irish coffee glasses, brandy & cognac snifters, martini sets, margarita glasses as well as crystal ashtrays.
